titleStmt.title: SII 23.345: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 345. (A.R. No. 345 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the west and south walls of the same maṇḍapa Rājak: Rājādhirāja I: year 33: 1050-51 A.D.

summary.p: This begins with the historical introduction Tiṅgaḷērtaru taṉṟoṅgal etc, and stops with the mention of the territorial division Maṇṇi-nāḍu in Rājēndrasiṁhavaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiṅkaḷertaru tanṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ
ppuṇarntu ceṅkoloccik karuṅkali kaṭintu tantaiyar tamaiyaṉ tampiyar taṉṟirumai
nta renṟivarai maṇimuṭi cūṭṭik kannikāvalar teṉnavar muvaruḷ vāṉaka miruvarukkaruḷik kānaka moruvanuk kaḷittup porucilaic ceralar velaikeḻu kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuppit tilaṅkaiyark karai caiyum Alaṅkal villavaṉaiyuṅ kannakucciyar kāvalaṉaiyum ponṉaṇi muṭittalai taṭintu taṉkoṭippaṭai
yevi kaṉnāṭakar vaṅkaṭkaripuraḷat taṉṉāṭaiyilt tamiḻpparaṇi koṇ ṭoṉṉār vaḷañcir neṭuvāḷ viñceyan veruneḷit tañci yoṭat taṉ vañciyam paṭaiyāl Āṅkavaṉ pitāvai mātāvoṭu catāmala viṅkunirp pūṇṭur veñcamattakap paṭuttiyappaṭai Ākava mallaṉ māṟṟarai peruva
ppittāṅkavar mārviṉi lāhavamallaṉ ṉaṅkaṇu mañciṉaneṉa naṉ keḻutic celuttiyapiṉ nāttaṉ pulikkoṭippaṭai Iyaroṭṭala rivāraṇa varaicaik kaṭalpuraic ciṟutuṟaip peruntuṟait teyvavi mātiye tuṟaimuṉṟiṉu muṉpu ṭṭiyāṅkavarettakkiriyi loṅka kaḷumuṟai yeṟeḻuti Uyar ja
yastambha meḻilpeṟa niṟuttit taṉkaḻal paṇintoḻar varaicar kaḷoṭu ceṇṭāṭip perā virakkoṭiyoṭi tiyākakkoṭi yeṭut toṉṉalark kavarnta toṉnetip piṟakka miravalār nerākkiṉatu viravalil vaḷaviṭutaṇṭattukka nuḷam ṅ kāḷidāsaṉum viṉam parutārc cāmuṇṭaṉum porari komayanum villavarā
caṉu Avar peru neti kavantu kūrccara ṉuppaḷaṉ koymmalar pacuntalai tārttayilp pantaṭittu muṉkoṇṭu takaivaṉatappaiyuṭaip pakaiyukuttu piṉṉava pil villaraicar raṅkatu mikai māṭṭātu taṉ puraṅkaḻal caraṇeṉap pukuta Ara
varkkaḷattuta ṭuk kuṭutta tattam muṭikkalaṅ koṭut tirntataṭa vaṉatappaiyaip paṟittuṭaṉ ko
ṭu pontu tu ṭṭapāṭiyeṉ ṭa meḻaraiyilakkamu minitaḷi tāṇṭu viśvalokattu viḷaṅku maṉu
niṉṟaśvametañ ceytaraicuviṟṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻan Uyarnta perumpukaḻk korājakecari vanmarāṉa Uṭai
yār śrī rājāthirājatevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 3Āvatu nāḷ 6 10 5- nāl rājentra ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu brahmade
Digital edition of SII 23.345 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
